What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A title card with text reading 'Minang's Kitchen' appears over a dark wood background. Raw chicken cuts and white rice grains are displayed behind an ingredients list. Water pours into a white ceramic bowl with scalloped rims containing malagkit rice. A blue silicone spatula stirs the soaking rice inside the bowl. A silver metal wok is placed on a stainless steel gas stovetop burner.

canonical_answer: At 10s, clear water is poured into a white bowl containing rice grains; at 14s, a blue spatula stirs the soaking rice inside the bowl; at 18s, a silver metal wok is placed onto the center gas stovetop burner.
